examples: Light sensor, accelerometer, compass (magnetometer) and gyroscope.
The optical pump magnetometer has the advantage of high sensitivity and resolution .
Tunneling magnetometer is a kind of MEMS magnetometer based on tunnel effect in quantum mechanics.
